definitions: A professional or company specializing in connecting and configuring various Internet of Things devices, platforms, and systems to create a cohesive and functional IoT solution.
An entity responsible for designing, implementing, and managing the end-to-end integration of IoT components within a specific environment or for a particular application.
examples: The company hired an IoT Integrator to streamline their smart factory operations.
Finding a skilled IoT Integrator was crucial for the project's success.
Many businesses rely on an IoT Integrator to navigate complex sensor networks.
